title: Peace Medicine
description: In the isolated cattle country of Chinook Valley, old loyalties and buried accusations simmer beneath the promise of spring. When Peace River Parker returns from prison to a land that branded him outlaw, he is drawn into a dangerous struggle between cattlemen, sheepmen, and the ruthless ambitions of men who would claim the range by force. Against a backdrop of frontier justice, uneasy romance, and hard-won honor, “Peace Medicine” unfolds as a classic Western tale of revenge, redemption, and the fight for a valley’s soul.
